utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: So , Phoebs owes $ 7 . 50 , Monica , you owe $ 10 , and Rachel , you owe fifteen big ones .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: But hey , thanks for teachin us Cross ... Eyed Mary . You guys , we gotta play that at our regular game .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Alright , here is my $ 7 . 50 . But I think you should know that this money is cursed .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Oh , I cursed it . So now bad things will happen to he who spends it .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: That is alright , I will take it .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Bad things happen to me anyway .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: This way I can break em up with a movie .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Well , that just leaves the big Green poker machine , who owes fifteen ...
